en: If your company is required to comply with Sweden's Social Insurance requirements, you will be asked to provide relevant documents in a subsequent form(s).
Please explain why your company is exempt from complying with Sweden's Social Insurance requirements.

Sweden requires companies to participate in statutory labor (social) insurance schemes, managed mainly by the Swedish Social Insurance Agency, with certain responsibilities handled by the Ministry of Health and Social Affairs and enforced per the Social Insurance Code (2010:110).
Is your company required to comply with Sweden's Social Insurance requirements as regulated by the Swedish Social Insurance Agency and maintain applicable documentation to show compliance?
Please select from the following reason(s) your company is exempt from complying with Sweden's Social Insurance requirements.
The company operates as a sole proprietorship with no additional employees.
The company does not have any employees in Sweden.

The company has foreign employee(s) working temporarily (less than 24 months) in Sweden that are covered by the home country's scheme and are prepared to provide a copy of the A1 certificate(s) upon request.
